response.step_by_step_log: 1. Scanned video: 00:00-01:56 is intro/banter; 01:56-04:46 is the performance of 'Orpheus'; 04:46-05:01 is closing. 2. Identified 'Orpheus' and credit to composer Koichi Tsutaya via on-screen text at 02:00. 3. Performed search for 'Mori Calliope Orpheus lyrics' to get full, accurate English lyrics. 4. Compiled JSON.
response.global_summary: A video featuring an introductory greeting and banter, followed by a full vocal performance of the song 'Orpheus' by Mori Calliope, and a short closing segment.

scenes.description: Mori Calliope and another VTuber introduce themselves and their band, including a drummer, and discuss past songs.
The song 'Orpheus' is performed by Mori Calliope and friend with a live band. Text on screen displays credits.
